---
title: "readthebigrdoc template example"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "BiGR: Bioinformatics Core Facility of Gustave Roussy, marine"
mail: "bigr@gustaveroussy.fr"
output:
  rmdformatbigr::readthebigrdoc:
    code_folding: show
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: false
    lightbox: false
pkgdown:
  as_is: true    
---


```{r, results="asis", echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
res <- knitr::knit_child('_example_body.Rmd', quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```
